pageContext.name: Tom and Jerry
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Soap Studio present the latest artist collab Tom and Jerry Collectible Figure!  Soap Studio and Pat Lee have created this robotic rendition of these all time classic cartoon characters. Behold Tom and Jerry in unique form, as cybernetic cat and mechanical mouse.  Whether you're a Tom and Jerry fan or a cartoon collectible enthusiast, don't miss out on adding this to your collection today!
